news.t: Morgan Stanley Unveils 6 ESG Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: CDEI is an equity ETF with a total of 273 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.24%, Apple at 8.22%, Alphabet at 7.84%, Microsoft at 6.00%, and Amazon.com at 3.35%.

overview.description: The Calvert US Large-Cap Diversity, Equity and Inclusion Index ETF (CDEI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted, ESG-screened index of large-cap stocks from the US. Company selection emphasize those invested in employee diversification practices. CDEI was launched on Jan 30, 2023 and is issued by Morgan Stanley.
infoTable: Calvert US Large-Cap Diversity Research Index

data.title: Morgan Stanley Unveils 6 ESG Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: Morgan Stanley MS +1.02% is expanding further into retail investing with its first exchange-traded funds, but faces a crowded field where legions of ETFs struggle to gain traction.
